name: Sirloin Dry Rub
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Pat the sirloin dry with paper towels before applying the rub.
4. Rub the seasoning mixture generously over both sides of the meat, ensuring even coverage.
5. Let the seasoned meat sit at room temperature for 30 minutes to an hour before cooking.
